prompt: Estimate or interpret the measurable condition and state why it is out of tolerance.
scenario: In a T5 work setting, the evaluated element is I-201 Calibration within 2.8 Instrumentation & Controls. The relevant subcategory is 2.8.2 Calibration & Loop Checks. The observed field condition is: 5-point cal skipped (hysteresis missed). The work is being assessed at the rough-complete lifecycle state with source anchors ISA standards, site QC. The measurable cue is visible enough to estimate whether the condition is within tolerance.
title: T5 I-201 Measurement & estimation
